---
title: "First Document"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```


## Load data

```{r}
Tri <- read_csv("https://tinyurl.com/NHANES-Data") |>
  filter(Triglycerides < 1000)

glimpse(Tri)

# read_csv("data/NHANES_Triglycerides.csv")
```


## Make a plot

```{r}
ggplot(Tri, aes(x = Waist, y = Triglycerides)) +
  geom_point(color = "darkred") +
  facet_grid(Sex ~ .) +
  theme_minimal()
```


## Statistics!

~ = "is modeled by"

```{r}
# Simple bivariate model of Waist
ols_model <- lm(Triglycerides ~ Waist, data = Tri)
summary(ols_model)
```

Model with Sex as a predictor.

```{r}
# Add sex predictor
ols_model2 <- lm(Triglycerides ~ Waist + Sex, data = Tri)
summary(ols_model2)

# Add interaction
ols_model3 <- lm(Triglycerides ~ Waist * Sex, data = Tri)
summary(ols_model3)
```
